name: Mushroom Side Dish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl combine biscuit mix, mushrooms, onion, pimiento, salt, and celery seed.
2. Mix together egg yolk and sour cream; stir into dry ingredients just until moistened.
3. Beat egg white to stiff peaks.
4. Gently fold beaten egg white into mushroom mixture.
5. Heat oil in a heavy saucepan or electric deep-fat fryer to 375 degrees Fahrenheit (190°C).
6. Drop batter by tablespoon into hot oil. Fry about 2 minutes, or until golden brown, turning once.
7. Transfer the fried pieces to a rack to drain.
8. Serve hot.
